versions.prompt: Soft, moody photograph of a mountain view through a fogged-up window. The glass has condensation on it — you can barely make out snow-covered peaks and pine trees through the haze. Warm interior light reflecting off the foggy glass, cool blue-grey shapes of mountains beyond. The feeling is being inside a warm lodge, looking out at the mountains on a cold morning before heading outside. Soft focus, atmospheric, analog film quality. Not sharp, not technical — cozy and anticipatory.
versions.analysis: The fogged window effect is very convincing — condensation drips, warm interior glow, blurred mountains beyond. Cozy lodge feel lands perfectly. Great as a cam loading/placeholder state. The warm vs cool contrast works well.
versions.iterate_notes: The buildings visible through the fog could be removed for a more wilderness feel. Otherwise very strong.

versions.prompt: Fogged cabin window looking out at wilderness, warm firelight glow, no buildings visible.
versions.analysis: Warm firelight glow reflecting in condensation with wilderness beyond. No buildings — pure mountain solitude feel.
versions.iterate_notes: Try frosted window with crystal patterns and candle glow — more magical and detailed.

versions.prompt: Frosted window with crystal patterns, candle glow, clear breathed patch showing mountains.
versions.analysis: Magical frost crystals on the glass with warm candle glow. The breathed-clear patch revealing mountains is a lovely storytelling detail.
versions.iterate_notes: Try steamed glass full-frame with an abstract mountain shape barely visible — more minimal, better 'cam not loaded' feel.

versions.prompt: Steamed glass full-frame, abstract mountain shape barely visible through fog, moody and minimal.
versions.analysis: Great 'cam not loaded' feel. Abstract and moody with just the suggestion of a mountain through the steam. Very minimal.
versions.iterate_notes: Try rain-streaked window at golden hour — amber droplets with mountain silhouette for warmer mood.

versions.prompt: Rain-streaked window at golden hour, amber droplets catching light, mountain silhouette beyond.
versions.analysis: Gorgeous amber rain droplets catching golden hour light with a mountain silhouette behind. Warm, inviting, atmospheric.
versions.iterate_notes: Could try combining the frost crystals from v2 with the golden hour warmth of v4. Or experiment with snow collecting on a window ledge.
